title: Determining Lipid Content in Embryos using Nile Red Fluorescence
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d4oaa","text":"The following protocol is derived from the protocol described by Genicot et al. (Theriogenology 63: 1181- 1194, 2005) and is based on the fluorescence emitted by Nile Red when in association with lipid (see Fowler and Greenspan, J Histochem Cytochem 33: 833-836, 1985).
